method_summary: Layer-wise Token Compression (LTC) applies adaptive token pooling at intermediate transformer layers to reduce effective tokens while preserving ranking quality.
key_innovation: The application of adaptive token compression at intermediate transformer layers specifically designed for cross-encoder rerankers, which was previously ineffective for this architecture.
best_result: Up to 116% QPS improvement for document ranking
title: Layer-wise Token Compression for Efficient Document Reranking
